message:
fix: make group CRUD methods consistently return (*Issue, error)

UpdateGroupMembers, AddGroupMember, and RemoveGroupMember now return
the updated *Issue alongside the error, matching CreateGroupBead's
signature. This eliminates the need for callers to make a separate
Get call after mutations.

(gt-4p791p.2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
